key_drivers: US-Israel military strikes on Iran (Feb 28-Mar 1) driving risk-off, safe-haven demand for gold and yen
Real yields falling (10Y TIPS at 1.74%, down from ~2.0%) supporting gold, tech, and rate-sensitive assets
BoJ hawkish normalization (rate at 0.75%, hawkish signals from Takata) combined with Iran safe-haven demand = strong bullish 6J
